docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY KEN JACKSON IS GRANTED. ATTORNEY ROBERT F. COHEN, ESQ. APPEARS THIS DAY. THE ORDER IS SIGNED BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF IN OPEN COURT ON DECEMBER-31-2014. JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($52.50 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED OCT-30-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, KEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY EVA MCCULLOCH--CREDIT DEPT. ASSISTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO PLACER COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, KEN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO PLACER COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, KEN

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
FILED SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY-CIVIL LORNA WALKER, ESQ., STATE BAR NO. 154724 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, KEN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $978.65 FILED BY MACMURRAY PACIFIC AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, KEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, KEN $978.65 PRINCIPAL, $82.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,061.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, KEN HEARING SET FOR FEB-24-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY JACKSON, KEN
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $160.48 INTEREST, $199.78 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, KEN
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, KEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2013 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC HEARING SET FOR DEC-31-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $117.16 ACCRUED INTEREST, $75.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, KEN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, KEN
